programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: This week, memory meets mission as contestants face off in a high-stakes Kim’s Game challenge—designed to sharpen recall under pressure with 100 points and team leadership on the line. With observation, speed, and accuracy all in play, remembering every detail could make or break the mission. As the team pushes forward, it’s time to dig deeper. Contestants open up about their backstories, revealing the powerful personal reasons that brought them to the toughest reality show on earth. Some are here to prove something. Others? To fight for more than just themselves. The action intensifies as Hoffner Knives returns with a brutal tactical evolution, testing shooting and blade skills with precision under pressure. A split-second difference determines the winner of a major reward—proving that in this game, every tenth of a second matters. The day wraps with a visit from HCA Precision Barrels and one final classroom lesson—a pointed reminder that in the world of elite operators, your story is your strength… or your downfall.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies (1937)

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Outlaw of the Range, 1936
programme.desc: A determined cowboy returns to his hometown to uncover the truth behind a series of cattle rustlings and land disputes that threaten local ranchers. As he digs deeper, he discovers a corrupt scheme driven by greed and betrayal. With danger closing in, he must rely on his courage and quick thinking to bring the outlaws to justice and restore peace to the range

programme.title: Rough Riders' Round-Up

programme.title: Guns Of Diablo 1964

programme.title: Sixgun Rhythm 1939
programme.desc: Melody meets mayhem in Sixgun Rhythm! When a singing cowboy rides into a town plagued by outlaws, he must trade his guitar for a six-shooter to defend the innocent. With gun-blazing action, spirited songs, and a dash of romance, this musical Western hits all the right notes of frontier adventure.
